post.content:
Experience: 3 years 2 months
Position: SDE3 at Startup
Location: Bengaluru
Date: August 2022

Uber recruiter reached out to me for the role, and gave me an OA round link, and scheduled interviews for next week.

- OA Round: https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/1515709/Uber-or-CodeSignal-OA-or-SE-2

- Machine Coding Round: Design a multithreaded job scheduler. A job can have multiple tasks, and each task can have a pre-requisite task as well. Jobs should run in as much parallelization as possible.

- DS+Algo round: Leetcode Optimal Account Balancing

- HLD round: Design group chat feature of whatsapp

- HM round: Behavioral questions like about a time I failed, managing conflicts, hardest project and why it was hard, have you taken talks or seminars, etc etc. Typical HM round, similar to other companies.
Where do you draw diagrams for HLD in the interview?
@OP, could you share some links to the solution of the Machine Coding Round ?
Are you joining Uber? if Yes, which team?
